agent_directives.directive: ZERO PLACEHOLDERS. Every function, class, route, handler, and module must be completely and correctly implemented. Never write TODO, FIXME, pass, NotImplemented, placeholder, stub, or mock in any production code path. If a section is complex, break it into smaller verified steps — never skip it. An incomplete implementation is worse than no implementation.

PHASED EXECUTION WITH GIT COMMITS. Execute in strict phase order defined below. At the END of every phase — and at every logical milestone within a phase — commit to git using the GIT PROTOCOL defined in this prompt. Never accumulate more than one logical unit of work without committing. Each phase must end in a working, testable, committed state.

PRODUCTION CODE STANDARDS. All code must follow: - PEP 8 style guide enforced via black and flake8 - Type hints on ALL functions, methods, and class attributes — no exceptions - Google-style docstrings on all public classes and functions - Structured logging via loguru — never bare print() in production paths - Exception handling at every I/O boundary (DB, API, file, network, audio) - Environment variables for ALL secrets and config — zero hardcoded values - Input validation and sanitization on all external inputs - Pydantic v2 models for all data validation — never raw dicts from external sources

SECURITY STANDARDS. Implement ALL of the following without exception: - All secrets via python-dotenv from .env (never committed to git) - .gitignore excludes: .env, __pycache__, *.pyc, logs/, .venv/, *.egg-info/ - Meta webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification on every single POST request - Payment gateway signature/hash verification per gateway spec — reject invalid - SQL injection prevention via Supabase SDK parameterized queries only - Rate limiting per WhatsApp number per distributor (message + voice + AI call limits) - Input length limits on all user-provided text (messages, names, addresses) - Phone numbers, CNICs, and addresses masked or encrypted — never plaintext in logs - HTTPS enforced via hosting platform (Railway/Render) - Admin API endpoints protected by X-Admin-Key header from environment - CNIC encrypted at application level (Fernet) before any DB write - Prompt injection sanitization on all user content before AI inclusion

ORDER CONTEXT PERSISTENCE. Every order in progress must have its FULL context stored in the session. The order context is defined in the ORDER CONTEXT SCHEMA section of this prompt. It must be stored in sessions.pending_order_draft as JSONB. The bot must be able to reconstruct the complete order conversation state from this context alone — no state should exist only in memory. If the process restarts mid-order, the customer must be able to continue seamlessly from where they left off.

MULTI-PROVIDER ABSTRACTION. All AI providers and all payment gateways are accessed through abstract base classes and factory patterns. Switching providers requires only an environment variable change — zero code changes. Every new provider is a new implementation file that inherits from the abstract base class.

MODULAR ARCHITECTURE. Each module independently testable. No circular imports. Dependency injection preferred over global state. Database access only through the repository layer — never direct DB calls in handlers or business logic.

DOCUMENTATION. Every module must have: - Module-level docstring explaining purpose, inputs, outputs, side effects - Inline comments on all non-obvious logic - README.md at project root and per major module directory - .env.example with ALL required variables listed (descriptions, no real values) - FastAPI OpenAPI docs auto-generated via route decorators - docs/ directory with architecture, schema, deployment, onboarding, flow docs

DATABASE FIRST. Implement and verify the complete database schema before any application logic that touches it. Apply migrations via numbered SQL files in order. Never mutate schema ad hoc. Schema is the source of truth.

TESTING. Unit tests for all core business logic. Integration tests for all webhook flows and DB operations. pytest with pytest-asyncio. Minimum 80% coverage on core modules enforced by pytest-cov. Tests mirror app/ structure under tests/. Every gateway, every AI provider, every FSM state must be tested.

FOLDER STRUCTURE STRICT. Follow the exact folder structure defined in this prompt. Do not deviate, merge, abbreviate, or skip any directory or file. This is an industry-standard Python project layout — follow it precisely.

GIT PROTOCOL. Follow the GIT PROTOCOL section exactly. Commit frequently — every logical unit of work. Commit messages must follow Linus Torvalds style. Every commit message must end with: Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi Never batch multiple unrelated changes in one commit.

setup.step: git init at project root on Phase 1 first action
Create .gitignore immediately — before any other file — and commit it alone

commit_frequency.rule: Commit after every completed file or tightly related group of files (max 3-4 files)
Commit after every migration file or group of related migrations
Commit at the end of every phase — a "phase complete" commit
Commit after every test file written
Commit after fixing any bug discovered during testing
Never let more than one logical feature accumulate without committing
If a file is modified, commit the modification separately from additions

message_format.description: Linus Torvalds style: imperative mood, specific, technical, no fluff. First line: max 72 chars — summarizes WHAT changed. Blank line. Body: WHY this change, WHAT problem it solves, any non-obvious implications. Body lines max 72 chars each. Final line: Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi

example.summary: payments: add abstract PaymentGateway base class with full interface
example.body:
Define the contract all payment gateway implementations must satisfy. The base class enforces: generate_payment_link(), verify_webhook_signature(), process_callback(), and get_payment_status() as abstract methods.
This ensures any future gateway (SafePay, NayaPay, bank, etc.) can be plugged in without touching any business logic — only the factory needs updating. All gateways now speak a common interface.
Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi

example.summary: sessions: implement full order context persistence in pending_order_draft
example.body:
Order context is now fully serialized to JSONB on every state transition. Includes: items list with catalog snapshots, quantities, unit prices, discount requests, out-of-stock flags, unlisted item flags, voice transcription source markers, conversation step tracking, and ambiguity resolution state.
Process restart no longer loses in-progress orders. Customer continues from exact state without re-entering any information already provided.
Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi

example.summary: ai: implement multi-provider factory with runtime provider switching
example.body:
The AI factory now reads ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER from environment and returns the correct provider instance without any code changes needed.
Supported providers: gemini (text+audio), openai (gpt+whisper), anthropic (claude), cohere. Each implements the AIProvider abstract base class with identical interface signatures.
Provider-specific error codes are normalized to TeletraanAIError so all callers handle failures identically regardless of provider.
Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi

order_context_schema.description: This is the COMPLETE specification of what must be stored in sessions.pending_order_draft (JSONB) for every order in progress. Every field is REQUIRED unless marked optional. The context must be sufficient to fully reconstruct the order conversation state after a complete process restart. Update this context on every state transition — never leave it stale.

field.name: order_context_version
field.note: Schema version for forward compatibility

field.name: session_order_id
field.note: Temporary ID for this draft before DB write — generate on first item add

field.name: flow_step
field.note: Current step in order flow: item_collection | item_confirmation | bill_preview | discount_request | final_confirmation | complete

field.name: initiated_at
field.note: When customer started this order

field.name: last_modified_at
field.note: Update on every change

field.name: total_messages_in_order
field.note: Count of messages exchanged for this order — for analytics

field.name: items
field.note: All items added to the order so far

field.name: line_id
field.note: Unique per line item — for edit/remove targeting

field.name: catalog_id
field.note: null if unlisted item

field.name: medicine_name_raw
field.note: Exactly what the customer typed/said — preserved for audit

field.name: medicine_name_matched
field.note: Name after fuzzy matching to catalog

field.name: medicine_name_display
field.note: Name shown to customer in bill

field.name: strength
field.note: e.g., 500mg

field.name: form
field.note: e.g., tablet, syrup

field.name: unit
field.note: e.g., strip, box, carton

field.name: price_per_unit_paisas
field.note: Price snapshot at time of addition

field.name: line_subtotal_paisas
field.note: quantity × price — before discounts

field.name: line_total_paisas
field.note: After discount

field.name: stock_available_at_add
field.note: Stock qty at time of addition

field.name: is_unlisted
field.note: True if not in catalog

field.name: is_confirmed_by_customer
field.note: Customer explicitly confirmed this item match

field.name: input_method
field.note: ENUM: text | voice | button_selection

field.name: voice_transcription
field.note: Original voice transcription if input_method=voice

field.name: fuzzy_match_score
field.note: RapidFuzz score — null if exact match or unlisted

field.name: fuzzy_alternatives_shown
field.note: Other options shown to customer during match

field.name: request_type
field.note: ENUM: bonus_units | percentage | flat_amount

field.name: status
field.note: ENUM: pending | approved | rejected | auto_applied

field.name: request_text
field.note: Exactly what customer said for order-level discount

field.name: status
field.note: ENUM: pending | approved | rejected

field.name: auto_applied_discounts
field.note: List of auto-applied rule IDs and amounts

field.name: address
field.note: Delivery address — copied from customer profile, can be overridden

field.name: delivery_day_display
field.note: e.g., 'Kal ya parson' in customer's language

field.name: line_id
field.note: Which line item needs clarification

field.name: ambiguity_type
field.note: ENUM: multiple_matches | quantity_unclear | unit_unclear | strength_unclear

field.name: voice_order_context
field.note: Populated when order initiated via voice

field.name: original_transcription
field.note: Full raw transcription of voice order

field.name: ai_confidence
field.note: ENUM: high | medium | low

field.name: quick_reorder_source
field.note: Populated if this is a reorder

field.name: items_changed
field.note: Did customer modify items from source order

field.name: customer_notes
field.note: Free-text notes customer added to order

field.name: bill_shown_at
field.note: When bill preview was shown

field.name: bill_shown_count
field.note: How many times bill was shown — detect loops

field.name: ai_context_summary
field.note: AI-generated 2-sentence summary of order so far — injected into AI context to save tokens on long orders

update_rules.rule: Update last_modified_at on every field change
Update pricing_snapshot whenever any item is added, removed, or modified
Never delete items from the items array — set a cancelled flag instead (for audit)
Append to voice_order_context only — never overwrite
Persist context to DB (session update) on every state transition — not just at end
When order is confirmed and written to orders table, clear pending_order_draft to {}
Generate ai_context_summary when items count exceeds 8 — reduces token usage

project_identity.type: WhatsApp Intelligent Order and Operations Automation System

item.name: FastAPI
item.role: Async web framework and webhook server

item.name: Uvicorn
item.role: ASGI server with gunicorn in production

item.name: Pydantic
item.role: Data validation, settings management, all model definitions

ai_providers.description: ALL AI providers accessed through the abstract AIProvider base class. The factory reads ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER from environment. Switching providers = change one env var. Zero code changes required. Text and voice (STT) are separately configurable via ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER and ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER.

provider.name: Google Gemini
provider.strengths: Best Urdu/Roman Urdu, cheap, audio native

provider.name: Anthropic Claude
provider.audio_model: Not natively supported — route STT to whisper if anthropic selected as text provider

provider.name: Cohere
provider.audio_model: Not supported — route STT to whisper

provider.name: OpenRouter
provider.text_model: Configured via OPENROUTER_MODEL env var — any OpenRouter model
provider.strengths: Access to 100+ models via one API key

env_vars.var: ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER — ENUM: gemini, openai, anthropic, cohere, openrouter
ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER — ENUM: gemini, whisper (openai). Defaults to ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER if compatible
AI_TEXT_MODEL — Override default model for chosen provider
AI_PREMIUM_MODEL — Premium model for complex tasks (intent ambiguity, conflict resolution)

payment_gateways.description: ALL gateways implement abstract PaymentGateway base class. Factory reads ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY from environment. Multiple gateways can be active simultaneously — ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY is the default. Customer or distributor can select alternate gateway per transaction if enabled. Every gateway must implement: generate_link(), verify_signature(), process_callback(), get_status(), cancel_payment(), and get_gateway_metadata().

gateway.name: SafePay
gateway.notes: SafePay supports Visa, Mastercard, UnionPay, and mobile wallets. Generates hosted checkout page URL. Webhook delivers payment confirmation. Best for distributors wanting to pay by debit/credit card.

gateway.name: NayaPay
gateway.notes: NayaPay is growing rapidly in Pakistan. Supports QR code payments. Implement payment initiation + QR code URL return + webhook confirmation.

gateway.name: Bank Transfer
gateway.type: Manual bank transfer with automated confirmation
gateway.api: None — manual process with bot assistance
gateway.auth: Screenshot verification via owner manual approval
gateway.flow: Bot sends bank account details (configurable per owner via env). Customer/distributor transfers and sends screenshot. Bot downloads image, stores in Supabase Storage. Notifies owner with screenshot and payer details. Owner sends confirmation command → bot auto-extends subscription. Full audit trail maintained.

gateway.name: Dummy Gateway
gateway.notes: Full lifecycle simulation: link generation, auto-confirm after delay, failure simulation (amount ending in 99 paisas = auto-fail), expiry simulation (links expire after 15 minutes in dummy mode). ONLY activatable when APP_ENV != production. Guards enforced in factory.

env_vars.var: ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY — ENUM: jazzcash, easypaisa, safepay, nayapay, bank_transfer, dummy
PAYMENT_CALLBACK_BASE_URL — Public HTTPS URL for gateway callbacks
PAYMENT_LINK_EXPIRY_MINUTES — Default 60, how long payment links remain valid

item.name: asyncpg
item.role: Async PostgreSQL driver for complex queries

item.name: Meta Cloud API
item.role: WhatsApp Business API — all message types

item.name: httpx
item.role: Async HTTP client for all outbound calls

item.name: ffmpeg
item.role: Audio codec backend — must be installed on server

item.name: reportlab
item.role: PDF catalog and order receipt generation

item.name: Pillow
item.role: Image processing for catalog image generation

item.name: tenacity
item.role: Retry logic for all external API calls

item.name: cachetools
item.role: In-memory TTL cache for catalog and distributor lookups

item.name: cryptography
item.role: Fernet symmetric encryption for sensitive fields

item.name: phonenumbers
item.role: Pakistan phone number validation and E.164 normalization

item.name: Supabase Storage
item.role: Files: Excel, PDFs, voice recordings, screenshots

folder_structure.tree: teletraan/ │ ├── app/ │ ├── api/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── webhook.py # Meta webhook verify + receive │ │ ├── health.py # /health — dependency status check │ │ ├── admin.py # Admin API — X-Admin-Key protected │ │ └── payments.py # All gateway callback endpoints │ │ │ ├── core/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── config.py # Pydantic Settings — all env vars typed + validated │ │ ├── security.py # HMAC verification, Fernet encrypt/decrypt, token utils │ │ ├── logging.py # Loguru config — JSON prod, colored dev, PII masking │ │ ├── exceptions.py # Full custom exception hierarchy │ │ └── constants.py # Enums, limits, state names, timeouts │ │ │ ├── db/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── client.py # Supabase client singleton + health check │ │ ├── repositories/ │ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ │ ├── distributor_repo.py │ │ │ ├── customer_repo.py │ │ │ ├── order_repo.py │ │ │ ├── order_item_repo.py │ │ │ ├── catalog_repo.py │ │ │ ├── session_repo.py │ │ │ ├── payment_repo.py │ │ │ ├── complaint_repo.py │ │ │ ├── support_ticket_repo.py │ │ │ ├── prospect_repo.py │ │ │ ├── analytics_repo.py │ │ │ ├── audit_repo.py │ │ │ ├── notification_repo.py │ │ │ ├── scheduled_message_repo.py │ │ │ └── rate_limit_repo.py │ │ └── models/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── distributor.py │ │ ├── customer.py │ │ ├── order.py │ │ ├── catalog.py │ │ ├── session.py │ │ ├── payment.py │ │ ├── complaint.py │ │ ├── support_ticket.py │ │ ├── prospect.py │ │ ├── audit.py │ │ └── order_context.py # Pydantic model for pending_order_draft JSONB │ │ │ ├── whatsapp/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── client.py # Meta Cloud API async client │ │ ├── message_types.py # All outbound message payload builders │ │ ├── parser.py # Incoming webhook parser — all message types │ │ └── media.py # Media download (voice, images) + Supabase upload │ │ │ ├── ai/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── base.py # Abstract AIProvider base class │ │ ├── factory.py # Provider factory — reads ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER env │ │ ├── providers/ │ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ │ ├── gemini_provider.py # Gemini text + audio implementation │ │ │ ├── openai_provider.py # OpenAI GPT + Whisper implementation │ │ │ ├── anthropic_provider.py # Anthropic Claude implementation │ │ │ ├── cohere_provider.py # Cohere implementation │ │ │ └── openrouter_provider.py # OpenRouter proxy implementation │ │ ├── nlu.py # Intent classification + entity extraction │ │ ├── voice.py # Voice pipeline — ogg download → STT → transcription │ │ ├── response_generator.py # Multi-language response generation │ │ └── prompts/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── order_bot_prompts.py │ │ ├── sales_bot_prompts.py │ │ └── system_prompts.py │ │ │ ├── channels/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── router.py # Message routing by phone_number_id │ │ ├── channel_a/ │ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ │ ├── handler.py │ │ │ ├── onboarding.py │ │ │ ├── order_flow.py │ │ │ ├── catalog_flow.py │ │ │ ├── complaint_flow.py │ │ │ ├── profile_flow.py │ │ │ ├── inquiry_flow.py │ │ │ └── state_machine.py │ │ └── channel_b/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── handler.py │ │ ├── sales_flow.py │ │ ├── onboarding_flow.py │ │ ├── service_registry.py │ │ └── state_machine.py │ │ │ ├── distributor_mgmt/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── subscription_manager.py │ │ ├── reminder_service.py │ │ ├── notification_service.py │ │ ├── onboarding_service.py │ │ └── support_service.py │ │ │ ├── payments/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── base.py # Abstract PaymentGateway base class │ │ ├── factory.py # Gateway factory — reads ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY │ │ ├── gateways/ │ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ │ ├── jazzcash.py │ │ │ ├── easypaisa.py │ │ │ ├── safepay.py │ │ │ ├── nayapay.py │ │ │ ├── bank_transfer.py │ │ │ └── dummy_gateway.py │ │ └── webhook_handlers.py # Unified post-payment lifecycle │ │ │ ├── inventory/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── catalog_service.py │ │ ├── stock_service.py │ │ ├── sync_service.py │ │ └── fuzzy_matcher.py │ │ │ ├── orders/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── order_service.py │ │ ├── billing_service.py │ │ ├── context_manager.py # Order context CRUD — read/write/validate order context │ │ └── logging_service.py │ │ │ ├── reporting/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── excel_generator.py │ │ ├── pdf_generator.py │ │ ├── analytics_service.py │ │ └── report_scheduler.py │ │ │ ├── scheduler/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── scheduler.py │ │ └── jobs/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── reminder_jobs.py │ │ ├── sync_jobs.py │ │ ├── report_jobs.py │ │ ├── cleanup_jobs.py │ │ └── health_jobs.py │ │ │ ├── notifications/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── whatsapp_notifier.py │ │ └── templates/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── urdu_templates.py │ │ ├── english_templates.py │ │ └── roman_urdu_templates.py │ │ │ ├── analytics/ │ │ ├── __init__.py │ │ ├── order_analytics.py │ │ ├── customer_analytics.py │ │ ├── distributor_analytics.py │ │ └── system_analytics.py │ │ │ └── main.py │ ├── migrations/ │ ├── 001_create_extensions.sql │ ├── 002_create_subscription_plans.sql │ ├── 003_create_distributors.sql │ ├── 004_create_customers.sql │ ├── 005_create_catalog.sql │ ├── 006_create_discount_rules.sql │ ├── 007_create_delivery_zones.sql │ ├── 008_create_sessions.sql │ ├── 009_create_orders.sql │ ├── 010_create_order_items.sql │ ├── 011_create_order_status_history.sql │ ├── 012_create_payments.sql │ ├── 013_create_complaints.sql │ ├── 014_create_support_tickets.sql │ ├── 015_create_prospects.sql │ ├── 016_create_service_registry.sql │ ├── 017_create_notifications_log.sql │ ├── 018_create_audit_log.sql │ ├── 019_create_inventory_sync_log.sql │ ├── 020_create_analytics_events.sql │ ├── 021_create_rate_limits.sql │ ├── 022_create_scheduled_messages.sql │ ├── 023_create_catalog_import_history.sql │ ├── 024_create_bot_configuration.sql │ ├── 025_enable_rls_policies.sql │ ├── 026_create_indexes.sql │ └── 027_seed_data.sql │ ├── tests/ │ ├── __init__.py │ ├── conftest.py │ ├── unit/ │ │ ├── test_nlu.py │ │ ├── test_billing.py │ │ ├── test_order_context.py │ │ ├── test_fuzzy_matcher.py │ │ ├── test_state_machine_a.py │ │ ├── test_state_machine_b.py │ │ ├── test_subscription_manager.py │ │ ├── test_payment_gateways.py │ │ ├── test_ai_providers.py │ │ ├── test_voice_pipeline.py │ │ ├── test_message_parser.py │ │ └── test_security.py │ └── integration/ │ ├── test_webhook_flow.py │ ├── test_order_flow.py │ ├── test_onboarding_flow.py │ ├── test_distributor_mgmt.py │ └── test_payment_flow.py │ ├── scripts/ │ ├── run_migrations.py │ ├── seed_catalog.py │ ├── create_distributor.py │ ├── test_webhook_locally.py │ └── rotate_api_keys.py │ ├── docs/ │ ├── architecture.md │ ├── api_reference.md │ ├── database_schema.md │ ├── deployment_guide.md │ ├── onboarding_guide.md │ ├── payment_gateways.md │ ├── ai_providers.md │ └── conversation_flows.md │ ├── .env.example ├── .env # NEVER commit ├── .gitignore ├── .pre-commit-config.yaml ├── pyproject.toml ├── requirements.txt ├── requirements-dev.txt ├── Procfile ├── render.yaml └── README.md

database_schema.description: PostgreSQL via Supabase. Multi-tenant with distributor_id FK on all tenant tables. RLS at DB level. UUIDs as PKs. Financial amounts in paisas (BIGINT) — no floats. Soft deletes where applicable. Full audit trail. All tables have created_at/updated_at. updated_at maintained by DB trigger on all tables.

col.name: subscription_status
col.note: ENUM: trial, active, expiring, suspended, cancelled

col.name: catalog_sync_url
col.note: Google Drive or Supabase Storage URL for inventory sync

col.name: preferred_payment_gateway
col.note: Override ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY for this distributor's subscription fees

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: form
col.note: tablet, capsule, syrup, injection, sachet, cream, drops

col.name: unit
col.note: strip, box, carton, bottle, vial, sachet

col.name: reserved_quantity
col.note: Qty reserved in pending confirmed orders

columns.constraint: UNIQUE(distributor_id, sku) WHERE sku IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = false

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: catalog_id
col.type: UUID REFERENCES catalog(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: rule_type
col.note: ENUM: bonus_units, percentage_discount, flat_discount, minimum_order, tiered_pricing

col.name: priority
col.note: Higher = applied first if multiple rules match

col.name: usage_limit
col.note: Max times this rule can be used — NULL = unlimited

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: conversation_history
col.note: Last 15 turns for AI context — rolling window

col.name: pending_order_draft
col.note: FULL order context per ORDER CONTEXT SCHEMA — see spec above

col.name: handoff_mode
col.note: True when human agent requested — AI paused

col.name: status
col.note: ENUM: pending, confirmed, processing, dispatched, delivered, cancelled, returned, partially_fulfilled

col.name: payment_method
col.note: ENUM: cash, credit, jazzcash, easypaisa, safepay, nayapay, bank_transfer, dummy

col.name: order_context_snapshot
col.note: Snapshot of order context at confirmation — for audit

col.name: order_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: order_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: gateway
col.note: ENUM: jazzcash, easypaisa, safepay, nayapay, bank_transfer, dummy, manual

col.name: status
col.note: ENUM: pending, completed, failed, refunded, expired, cancelled

col.name: category
col.note: wrong_item, late_delivery, damaged_goods, expired_medicine, short_quantity, billing_error, other

col.name: status
col.note: ENUM: open, in_progress, resolved, closed, rejected

col.name: category
col.note: bot_issue, billing, setup, feature_request, gateway_issue, other

col.name: status
col.note: new, qualified, demo_booked, proposal_sent, payment_pending, converted, lost, waitlisted

table.name: audit_log
table.note: Immutable — no updates, no deletes on this table. RLS: INSERT only.

col.name: ai_provider
col.note: Which AI provider handled this event

col.name: distributor_id
col.type: UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES distributors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

col.name: preferred_payment_gateways
col.note: Ordered list of gateways to offer customers

indexes.index: CREATE INDEX idx_customers_distributor_number ON customers (distributor_id, whatsapp_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_distributor_number ON sessions (distributor_id, whatsapp_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_expiry ON sessions (expires_at) WHERE current_state != 'idle'
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_distributor_date ON orders (distributor_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON orders (distributor_id, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_catalog_active ON catalog (distributor_id) WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false
CREATE INDEX idx_catalog_name ON catalog (distributor_id, medicine_name text_pattern_ops)
CREATE INDEX idx_catalog_keywords ON catalog USING GIN (search_keywords)
CREATE INDEX idx_payments_distributor ON payments (distributor_id, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_distributors_subscription ON distributors (subscription_end) WHERE subscription_status IN ('active', 'expiring')
CREATE INDEX idx_analytics_distributor_time ON analytics_events (distributor_id, occurred_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_scheduled_messages_due ON scheduled_messages (scheduled_for, status) WHERE status = 'pending'
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_entity ON audit_log (entity_type, entity_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_rate_limits_lookup ON rate_limits (distributor_id, whatsapp_number, window_start)

var.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
var.desc: Fernet key for CNIC and sensitive field encryption — generate with Fernet.generate_key()

var.name: ADMIN_API_KEY
var.desc: X-Admin-Key header value for admin endpoints

var.name: META_VERIFY_TOKEN
var.desc: You define this — used for webhook verification

var.name: OWNER_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
var.desc: Meta Phone Number ID for Channel B owner SIM

var.name: AI_TEXT_MODEL
var.desc: Override default model for chosen provider

var.name: AI_PREMIUM_MODEL
var.desc: Premium model for complex reasoning tasks

var.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
var.desc: Service role — full access — never expose

var.name: ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY
var.values: jazzcash, easypaisa, safepay, nayapay, bank_transfer, dummy

var.name: PAYMENT_CALLBACK_BASE_URL
var.desc: Public HTTPS URL for gateway callbacks

ai_provider_abstraction.abstract_base:
app/ai/base.py must define AIProvider as an abstract base class with these abstract methods: - generate_text(system_prompt, messages, temperature, max_tokens) → AITextResponse - transcribe_audio(audio_bytes, mime_type, language_hint) → AITranscriptionResponse - estimate_cost(tokens_in, tokens_out) → int (paisas) - get_provider_name() → str - get_model_name() → str - health_check() → bool
AITextResponse must contain: content (str), tokens_used_input (int), tokens_used_output (int), finish_reason (str), raw_response (dict), estimated_cost_paisas (int)
AITranscriptionResponse must contain: text (str), confidence (str), language_detected (str), duration_seconds (float), raw_response (dict)
ai_provider_abstraction.error_normalization: Every provider must catch provider-specific exceptions and re-raise as TeletraanAIError with: provider name, original error message, is_retryable (bool), is_quota_exceeded (bool), is_content_filtered (bool). All callers handle TeletraanAIError — never provider-specific exceptions.
ai_provider_abstraction.fallback_chain: If ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER fails and AI_FALLBACK_PROVIDER is set in env: Factory automatically tries fallback provider once. Fallback attempt logged to analytics_events with provider switching noted. If fallback also fails: use rule-based response templates — bot continues.

payment_gateway_abstraction.abstract_base:
app/payments/base.py must define PaymentGateway as abstract base class with: - generate_payment_link(amount_paisas, reference_id, description, payer_phone) → PaymentLinkResponse - verify_webhook_signature(payload_bytes, headers) → bool - process_callback(payload_dict) → PaymentCallbackResult - get_payment_status(gateway_transaction_id) → PaymentStatusResult - cancel_payment(gateway_transaction_id) → bool - get_gateway_name() → str - get_gateway_metadata() → dict (supported features, limits, etc.) - health_check() → bool
PaymentLinkResponse: link_url (str), gateway_order_id (str), expires_at (datetime), metadata (dict)
PaymentCallbackResult: is_successful (bool), amount_paisas (int), gateway_transaction_id (str), failure_reason (str or None), raw_payload (dict)
payment_gateway_abstraction.idempotency: All gateways must implement idempotency check: Before processing any callback, check payments table for gateway_transaction_id. If already processed (status = completed), return success without re-processing. Log duplicate callback to audit_log. Return 200 to gateway.
payment_gateway_abstraction.signature_failure_handling: If signature verification fails: log to audit_log with full headers and body preview. Return HTTP 400 (not 401 — avoid leaking auth information). Alert owner via WhatsApp if 3+ failed verifications in 10 minutes from same IP.

module.name: AI and NLU Engine — Multi-Provider
module.changes_from_v1: Replace Gemini-specific calls with AIProvider factory calls. Track ai_provider in all analytics_events. Implement fallback chain per AI_PROVIDER_ABSTRACTION spec. Support ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER separately from ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER. Log which provider handled each request and its cost estimate. Add health_check calls for AI provider in scheduler health job.

module.name: Voice Pipeline — Multi-STT
module.changes_from_v1: Voice pipeline routes to ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER — not hardcoded to Gemini. If ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER = gemini: send audio bytes directly to Gemini. If ACTIVE_STT_PROVIDER = whisper: send to OpenAI Whisper endpoint. Both paths produce AITranscriptionResponse with same fields. Audio conversion (pydub/ffmpeg) happens before sending to any STT provider. STT provider health checked separately from text AI health.

module.name: Payment Layer — Multi-Gateway
module.changes_from_v1: All gateway logic moved to app/payments/gateways/ subdirectory. Factory pattern for all gateways — ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY env selects default. Per-distributor preferred_payment_gateway override supported. Add SafePay gateway: hosted checkout URL generation + HMAC webhook verification. Add NayaPay gateway: merchant payment initiation + QR URL + webhook. Add bank_transfer gateway: non-API flow (instructions + screenshot + manual confirm). Gateway selection can be offered to payer when multiple gateways configured. All gateway events tracked in analytics_events with payment_gateway field. Gateway health checks in scheduler health job. Payment admin commands: "list gateways", "check gateway [name]" via admin API. docs/payment_gateways.md — full integration guide for each gateway.

features.feature: Pydantic model: app/db/models/order_context.py — exact model of ORDER CONTEXT SCHEMA
create_empty_context() — initialize blank order context with session_order_id
add_item_to_context(context, item_data) → updated context with recalculated pricing_snapshot
update_item_quantity(context, line_id, new_qty) → recalculate line and pricing
apply_discount_to_item(context, line_id, discount_data) → update item and pricing
cancel_order(context, reason) → set order_cancelled and reason
get_context_from_session(session) → deserialize pending_order_draft to OrderContext model
save_context_to_session(context, session_repo, session_id) → serialize and persist
validate_context(context) → check all required fields present, quantities positive, prices consistent
generate_ai_summary(context, ai_provider) → summarize for long orders to save tokens
to_order_create_payload(context) → dict ready to insert into orders + order_items tables
context_to_display_string(context, language) → human-readable bill in customer's language

steps.step: git init — first command executed
Create .gitignore — second command — commit immediately: "Initial commit: add .gitignore for Python/FastAPI project"
Create .env.example with ALL variables — commit: "config: add .env.example with complete variable documentation"
Create README.md skeleton — commit: "docs: add README skeleton with project overview and quickstart"
Create pyproject.toml + requirements.txt + requirements-dev.txt — commit: "build: add Python project metadata and pinned dependencies"
Create .pre-commit-config.yaml (black, isort, flake8) — commit: "ci: add pre-commit hooks for code quality enforcement"
Create complete folder structure with all __init__.py files — commit: "project: scaffold complete industry-standard folder structure"
Implement app/core/config.py — commit: "core: implement Pydantic Settings with all env vars typed and validated"
Implement app/core/logging.py — commit: "core: implement loguru structured logging with PII masking filter"
Implement app/core/exceptions.py — commit: "core: define complete custom exception hierarchy"
Implement app/core/constants.py — commit: "core: define all enums, state names, limits, and timeouts"
Implement app/core/security.py — commit: "security: add HMAC verification, Fernet encryption, and token utilities"
Implement app/db/client.py — commit: "db: implement Supabase client singleton with connection validation"
Write all 27 migration SQL files — commit groups of related migrations: "db: migrations 001-007 core tables (plans, distributors, customers, catalog, rules, zones)"
Apply migrations to Supabase — verify all tables exist — commit: "db: apply all 27 migrations, verify schema in Supabase"
Implement all Pydantic DB models including order_context.py — commit: "db: add Pydantic models for all 15 database entities"
Implement all 15 repository files — commit per repository or group: "db: add repository layer for [domain] with full CRUD and query methods"
Implement app/main.py — commit: "app: implement FastAPI factory with lifespan, middleware, and router registration"
Implement app/api/health.py — commit: "api: add /health endpoint checking all system dependencies"
Verify server starts, /health returns 200 — PHASE 1 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-1: foundation and infrastructure complete, health check passing"
Implement app/whatsapp/message_types.py — commit: "whatsapp: add message payload builders for all Meta API message types"
Implement app/whatsapp/client.py — commit: "whatsapp: implement async Meta Cloud API client with retry and rate limit tracking"
Implement app/whatsapp/parser.py — commit: "whatsapp: add webhook payload parser for all incoming message types"
Implement app/whatsapp/media.py — commit: "whatsapp: add media download and Supabase Storage upload handlers"
Implement app/api/webhook.py — commit: "api: add Meta webhook handler with HMAC verification and message routing"
Implement app/channels/router.py — commit: "channels: implement message router with distributor resolution and channel dispatch"
Implement app/notifications/ — commit: "notifications: add WhatsApp notifier and all three language template files"
Implement app/notifications/whatsapp_notifier.py — commit: "notifications: implement send wrapper with logging, retry, and delivery tracking"
Test webhook verification with Meta console — test real message receive and reply — commit: "test: verify end-to-end webhook receive and text reply working"
Write unit tests for parser.py and message_types.py — commit: "tests: add unit tests for webhook parser and message type builders"
PHASE 2 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-2: WhatsApp API integration complete, verified end-to-end"
Implement app/ai/base.py — commit: "ai: define abstract AIProvider base class with full interface contract"
Implement app/ai/providers/gemini_provider.py — commit: "ai: implement Gemini provider for text and native audio transcription"
Implement app/ai/providers/openai_provider.py — commit: "ai: implement OpenAI provider with GPT text and Whisper STT"
Implement app/ai/providers/anthropic_provider.py — commit: "ai: implement Anthropic Claude provider with Whisper STT fallback"
Implement app/ai/providers/cohere_provider.py — commit: "ai: implement Cohere provider with Whisper STT fallback"
Implement app/ai/providers/openrouter_provider.py — commit: "ai: implement OpenRouter proxy provider via OpenAI-compatible API"
Implement app/ai/factory.py with fallback chain — commit: "ai: implement provider factory with env-driven selection and fallback chain"
Implement all prompts in app/ai/prompts/ — commit: "ai: add all system prompts for Channel A, Channel B, and shared utilities"
Implement app/ai/nlu.py — commit: "ai: implement NLU with intent classification, entity extraction, and Roman Urdu normalization"
Implement app/ai/voice.py — commit: "ai: implement voice pipeline with ogg download, conversion, and multi-provider STT"
Implement app/ai/response_generator.py — commit: "ai: implement multi-language response generation with provider abstraction"
Test NLU with 20+ sample messages across all languages — commit: "tests: add unit tests for NLU with mocked AI provider responses"
Test voice pipeline end-to-end with Gemini and OpenAI Whisper — commit: "tests: verify voice pipeline works with both STT providers"
PHASE 3 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-3: AI engine complete with 5 providers, NLU, voice pipeline tested"
Implement app/db/models/order_context.py — Pydantic model exact to spec — commit: "db: add OrderContext Pydantic model matching full order context schema"
Implement app/orders/context_manager.py — all 16 functions — commit: "orders: implement complete order context manager with all CRUD operations"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/state_machine.py — all states — commit: "channels: implement Channel A FSM with all states and transition validation"
Implement app/channels/channel_b/state_machine.py — commit: "channels: implement Channel B FSM for sales qualification and onboarding"
Implement session expiry logic — commit: "sessions: add expiry warning at 50min and auto-expire at 60min with notification"
Implement interrupt handling (cancel/menu from any state) — commit: "sessions: add universal interrupt handling for cancel and main-menu commands"
Test process restart mid-order — verify session resumes correctly — commit: "tests: verify order context survives process restart via session persistence"
Write unit tests for both FSMs and order context manager — commit: "tests: add comprehensive state machine and order context unit tests"
PHASE 4 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-4: order context persistence and session FSMs complete, restart-safe"
Implement app/inventory/fuzzy_matcher.py — commit: "inventory: implement RapidFuzz medicine matching with multi-field scoring and ranking"
Implement app/inventory/catalog_service.py — commit: "inventory: implement catalog CRUD, cache management, and category operations"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/onboarding.py — commit: "channel-a: implement full customer registration flow with validation and voice support"
Implement app/orders/billing_service.py — commit: "orders: implement billing with discount rules, bonus units, and delivery charges"
Implement app/orders/context_manager.py integration with billing — commit: "orders: integrate billing service with order context manager"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/order_flow.py — commit: "channel-a: implement complete order flow from item collection to confirmation"
Implement app/orders/order_service.py — commit: "orders: implement order CRUD with status management and history tracking"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/catalog_flow.py — commit: "channel-a: implement catalog browse, search, pagination, and document send"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/complaint_flow.py — commit: "channel-a: implement complaint submission with categories, photos, and ticket generation"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/profile_flow.py — commit: "channel-a: implement profile view and field-level edit flows"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/inquiry_flow.py — commit: "channel-a: implement inquiry handler for medicine questions, order status, and help"
Implement app/channels/channel_a/handler.py — commit: "channel-a: implement main handler dispatching to all flows based on state and intent"
Implement business hours, credit check, handoff flows — commit: "channel-a: add business hours enforcement, credit limit check, and human handoff"
Test all Channel A flows end-to-end — commit: "tests: integration tests for all Channel A conversation flows"
PHASE 5 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-5: all Channel A customer flows complete and integration tested"
Implement app/orders/logging_service.py — commit: "orders: implement order logging to WhatsApp group and Excel file"
Implement app/reporting/excel_generator.py — commit: "reporting: implement monthly Excel order log with all columns via openpyxl"
Implement app/reporting/pdf_generator.py — commit: "reporting: implement catalog PDF and order receipt generation via ReportLab"
Test WhatsApp group logging, Excel append, PDF generation — commit: "tests: verify order logging pipeline end-to-end"
PHASE 6 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-6: order logging and document generation complete"
Implement app/inventory/sync_service.py — commit: "inventory: implement Excel/CSV sync with validation, upsert, and error logging"
Implement app/inventory/stock_service.py — commit: "inventory: add stock level checks, is_in_stock updates, and low-stock detection"
Implement APScheduler inventory sync job — commit: "scheduler: add inventory sync job with per-distributor interval configuration"
Test full sync cycle — commit: "tests: verify inventory sync pipeline from upload to DB update to alert"
PHASE 7 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-7: inventory sync automation complete and tested"
Implement app/payments/base.py — commit: "payments: define abstract PaymentGateway base class with full interface"
Implement app/payments/gateways/dummy_gateway.py — commit: "payments: implement dummy gateway with full lifecycle simulation"
Implement app/payments/gateways/jazzcash.py — commit: "payments: implement JazzCash merchant API with HMAC verification"
Implement app/payments/gateways/easypaisa.py — commit: "payments: implement EasyPaisa business API with hash verification"
Implement app/payments/gateways/safepay.py — commit: "payments: implement SafePay checkout API with HMAC webhook verification"
Implement app/payments/gateways/nayapay.py — commit: "payments: implement NayaPay merchant API with QR code URL support"
Implement app/payments/gateways/bank_transfer.py — commit: "payments: implement bank transfer flow with screenshot capture and manual confirmation"
Implement app/payments/factory.py — commit: "payments: implement gateway factory with env-driven selection and per-distributor override"
Implement app/payments/webhook_handlers.py — commit: "payments: implement unified post-payment lifecycle with idempotency guarantees"
Implement app/api/payments.py — all callback endpoints — commit: "api: add callback endpoints for all 5 payment gateways with signature verification"
Test dummy gateway full lifecycle — test failure simulation — commit: "tests: verify dummy gateway complete payment lifecycle including failure scenarios"
Write unit tests for all gateways — commit: "tests: add unit tests for all 5 payment gateways with mocked responses"
PHASE 8 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-8: all 5 payment gateways implemented and tested"
Implement subscription_manager.py — commit: "distributor-mgmt: implement subscription lifecycle FSM with grace period handling"
Implement reminder_service.py — commit: "distributor-mgmt: implement payment reminder generation with deduplication via idempotency keys"
Implement notification_service.py — commit: "distributor-mgmt: implement batch notification system for updates and announcements"
Implement onboarding_service.py — commit: "distributor-mgmt: implement multi-step onboarding sequence from payment to go-live"
Implement support_service.py — commit: "distributor-mgmt: implement support ticket system with owner notification and resolution flow"
Implement all scheduler reminder and cleanup jobs — commit: "scheduler: add reminder, cleanup, and health check jobs"
Test reminder sequence and suspension flow — commit: "tests: integration tests for subscription reminder sequence and suspension lifecycle"
PHASE 9 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-9: automated distributor management complete and tested"
Implement app/channels/channel_b/service_registry.py — commit: "channel-b: implement dynamic service registry from DB with handler routing"
Implement app/channels/channel_b/sales_flow.py — commit: "channel-b: implement full prospect qualification through demo booking and payment"
Implement app/channels/channel_b/onboarding_flow.py — commit: "channel-b: implement post-payment distributor onboarding automation"
Implement app/channels/channel_b/handler.py — commit: "channel-b: implement sales channel handler with owner command processing"
Seed service_registry with Teletraan entry — commit: "db: seed service_registry with Teletraan service entry"
Test full Channel B flow — commit: "tests: integration test Channel B from first message to distributor creation"
PHASE 10 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-10: Channel B sales bot complete and integration tested"

phase.name: Analytics, Reports, and All Scheduler Jobs

steps.step: Implement all analytics services — commit: "analytics: implement order, customer, distributor, and system analytics services"
Implement report generators and email delivery — commit: "reporting: implement daily/weekly/monthly report generation and email dispatch"
Implement all scheduler jobs (report, sync, cleanup, health) — commit: "scheduler: complete all job definitions with error handling and failure alerting"
Test all scheduler jobs manually — commit: "tests: verify all scheduler jobs execute correctly and handle failures"
PHASE 11 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-11: analytics, reporting, and scheduler jobs complete"
Integrate rate limiting into message router — commit: "security: integrate per-number rate limiting in message router"
Implement admin API endpoints — commit: "api: implement protected admin API with full distributor and system management endpoints"
Verify CNIC encryption on all writes — commit: "security: verify Fernet encryption applied on all CNIC writes and reads"
Security audit pass: check all endpoints, all inputs, all logs — commit: "security: complete security audit pass, all PII masked, all inputs validated"
Write security unit tests — commit: "tests: add security tests for HMAC rejection, rate limiting, input validation"
PHASE 12 COMPLETE COMMIT: "phase-12: security hardening, rate limiting, and admin API complete"
Complete all remaining unit and integration tests to reach 80% coverage — commit: "tests: complete test suite, 80%+ coverage on core modules"
Write all docs/ files — commit: "docs: add architecture, schema, deployment, payment gateways, AI providers, flows guides"
Write scripts/ utility files — commit: "scripts: add migrations runner, catalog seeder, distributor creator, webhook tester"
Create render.yaml and Procfile — commit: "deploy: add Render and Railway deployment configurations"
Deploy to Render — verify health + webhook — commit: "deploy: production deployment on Render verified and live"
Full end-to-end smoke test on production — commit: "test: production smoke test passed — all flows verified on live deployment"
FINAL COMMIT: "teletraan: v1.0.0 complete — production-ready, all features implemented, all tests passing"

final_verification_checklist.check: Zero TODOs, FIXMEs, stubs in any Python file
All 27 SQL migrations applied and verified in Supabase
git log shows frequent, well-named commits in Linus style — all ending with Signed-off-by: Abdullah-Khan-Niazi
ACTIVE_AI_PROVIDER can be switched to any of 5 providers via env — verified with tests
ACTIVE_PAYMENT_GATEWAY can be switched to any of 5 gateways via env — verified with tests
Order context fully persists in sessions.pending_order_draft — process restart mid-order recovers seamlessly
All order context fields per spec are stored and retrievable
All 5 payment gateways implemented: jazzcash, easypaisa, safepay, nayapay, bank_transfer + dummy
All 5 AI providers implemented: gemini, openai, anthropic, cohere, openrouter
SafePay checkout URL generation and HMAC webhook verified
NayaPay payment initiation and webhook verified
Bank transfer flow: screenshot received, owner notified, manual confirm triggers extension
Dummy gateway auto-confirms after delay, fails on 99-paisa amounts, blocks in production
All Channel A flows tested: onboarding, order, voice, complaint, profile, language switch, quick reorder, credit check
Session survives process restart — conversation resumes from exact state
Reminder sequence fires at 7d, 3d, 1d, expiry — no duplicates (idempotency keys)
Channel B: prospect to payment to distributor created to onboarding sequence
All scheduler jobs registered, executing, and error-handling correctly
Rate limiter blocks and sends single warning — no further processing
Admin API X-Admin-Key protected — unauthorized requests rejected
CNIC encrypted before DB write — decrypted on read
Phone numbers last-4-only in all logs
pytest 80%+ coverage on core modules
All docs/ files complete and accurate
Render deployment live, health check green, all scheduler jobs active
No hardcoded secrets anywhere in codebase
Pre-commit hooks pass on all files (black, isort, flake8)
